title: Automated QIAcube DNA Extraction
author: Clemens Scherzer
materials: Empty i. Lid Position: Empty c. Position

Aliquot 284 µL, QIAgen Protease into a 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube.* Place in microcentrifuge tube slot A in QIAcube. * If there are less than 12 samples load materials according to the QIAcube loading chart found in the QIAcube binder.

steps.title: Heat water bath to 37 °C before starting
steps.instruction: Heat water bath to 37 °C before starting.

steps.title: Thaw Buffy Coat samples by gently...
steps.instruction: Thaw Buffy Coat samples by gently agitating sample in water bath.

steps.title: Add a fresh set of disposable...
steps.instruction: Add a fresh set of disposable 1000 µL and 200 µL tips to QIAcube.

steps.title: Lay out rotor adaptors on holding tray labeled DNA
steps.instruction: Lay out rotor adaptors on holding tray labeled DNA.

steps.title: QIAamp spin column i. Lid Position
steps.instruction: QIAamp spin column i. Lid Position: L1 b. Position

steps.title: 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube i. Lid Position
steps.instruction: 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube i. Lid Position: L3 It is very important that the lids go in the proper positions or else the QIAcube will generate an error message!

steps.title: Load rotor adaptors in centrifuge of QIAcube
steps.instruction: Load rotor adaptors in centrifuge of QIAcube.* * If there are less than 12 samples load materials according to the QIAcube loading chart found in the QIAcube binder.

steps.title: Aliquot 200 µL, Buffy Coat to...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 200 µL, Buffy Coat to Sample Tubes RB taking care to pipette up as much Buffy Coat as possible.

steps.title: Load Sample Tubes RB into sample tray of QIAcube
steps.instruction: Load Sample Tubes RB into sample tray of QIAcube.* * If there are less than 12 samples load materials according to the QIAcube loading chart found in the QIAcube binder.

steps.title: Close door of QIAcube and begin program
steps.instruction: Close door of QIAcube and begin program: DNA > QIAamp DNA Blood Mini > blood or body fluid > DNA isolation Part A

steps.title: Remove rotor adaptors and place on sample holding tray
steps.instruction: Remove rotor adaptors and place on sample holding tray. Make sure to place the adaptors in the corresponding numbered position in the sample tray that matches the number that the adaptor held in the centrifuge to prevent cross contamination of samples.

steps.title: Move QIAamp spin column from 1
steps.instruction: Move QIAamp spin column from 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube to Position 1 with lid in Position L1. (Part A step 6)

steps.title: Remove and cap 1
steps.instruction: Remove and cap 1.5 mL tube with DNA sample and label with Freezerbondz label DNA-01.

steps.title: Add a fresh 1
steps.instruction: Add a fresh 1.5 mL tube to rotor adaptor in Position 3 with lid in Position L3. (Part A step 6)

steps.title: Place rotor adaptors back in the...
steps.instruction: Place rotor adaptors back in the corresponding numbered position in QIAcube’s centrifuge.

steps.title: Add a fresh set of 200 µL disposable tips
steps.instruction: Add a fresh set of 200 µL disposable tips.

steps.title: Close QIAcube lid and begin program
steps.instruction: Close QIAcube lid and begin program: DNA > QIAamp DNA Blood Mini > blood or body fluid > Add Elution Part B

steps.title: When program has completed, discard QIAamp...
steps.instruction: When program has completed, discard QIAamp spin column and remove 1.5 mL tube. Label tube with Freezerbondz label DNA-02.

steps.title: Combine volume of DNA-02 to DNA-01...
steps.instruction: Combine volume of DNA-02 to DNA-01 and pipette up and down to mix to ensure a homogenous mixture of DNA.

steps.title: Split DNA back into two 200 µL, aliquots
steps.instruction: Split DNA back into two 200 µL, aliquots .

steps.title: Aliquot 3 µL, DNA into a 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 3 µL, DNA into a 1.5 mL tube for Cary concentration assay. (Store sample in -20 °C if not being immediately assayed.)

steps.title: Aliquot 2 µL, DNA into a PCR tube for
steps.instruction: Aliquot 2 µL, DNA into a PCR tube for .7% agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm for the presence and size of the DNA. (Store sample in -20 °C if not being immediately assayed.)
